summary: Completed regression testing after backend refactoring (server.py split into modular routes). All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Refactoring was successful - no functionality was broken.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats (requires admin token)
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly with U-CAN content
Frontend: Login page loads with Google redirect button and email/password form
Frontend: Register page loads with all form fields and Google button
Frontend: Email/password login flow works - redirects to dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring was done correctly - server.py reduced from 1628 lines to ~79 lines
All routes properly organized into separate modules under /routes/
Database connection correctly shared via database.py
API prefixes correctly set: /auth, /admin, /chat (others have no prefix)
All routers correctly included in main api_router with /api prefix

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified, login flow works

seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (emails with test_refactor_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from single server.py (1628 lines) to modular architecture: server.py (~79 lines) + 8 route files under /routes/. All API endpoints work exactly as before. Routes structure: auth_routes.py (prefix /auth), admin_routes.py (prefix /admin), chat_routes.py (prefix /chat), provider_routes.py (no prefix), subscription_routes.py (no prefix), social_routes.py (no prefix), notification_routes.py (no prefix), misc_routes.py (no prefix). All are nested under /api prefix. Comprehensive regression test file created: test_refactoring_regression.py with 22 tests covering all main endpoints.
